title: manulea altissima
intro: Manulea altissima, also known as the tall manulea or tall manuleah, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae, commonly referred to as the mint family. It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Manulea altissima typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used in traditional medicine practices.
